svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="seqlayout" name="Agent loop · 工具调用往返（GLM 4.7 + cmm）"> <mxGraphModel dx="-384" dy="-182" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;participant=umlActor;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=-14;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" value="User (题)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="100" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;" value="Agent
(sdk engine)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="100" x="250" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act1" parent="agent" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="10" x="45" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmm" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;outlineConnect=0;portConstraint=eastwest;size=40;" value="cmm_search
(语义检索)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="100" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act0" parent="cmm" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="10" x="45" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m0" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0.1731;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" target="act1" value="并查集的类叫什么？"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" source="act1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.2273;entryX=1;entryY=0.3636;" target="act1" value="分析 → 决定搜代码库"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="360" y="180" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="210" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" source="act1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;curved=0;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5455;entryX=0;entryY=0.0;" target="act0" value="tool_use(query="并查集")"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" source="act0" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7727;" target="act1" value="DisjointSet (math/disjoint_set.h)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" source="act1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;curved=0;rounded=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontColor=#999999;exitX=0;exitY=1.0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0.5962;" target="user" value="DisjointSet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note5" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="backstop 30 (no-kb 12) · 无 force-answer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="320" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note6" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="D7: tools=[] + setting_sources=[]
bypassPermissions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="530" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
